programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: S1:E12 Pingu Finishes the Job | Robby the Snowboarder | Pingu's Moon Adventure - Father tries to make a table but spends most of his time keeping Pingu out of his toolbox. | When Pingu goes snowboarding with Robby, he wishes he was as good at jumps as his friend. | Grandfather tells Pingu about the moon and he desperately wants to visit.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: S1:E13 Pingu & Pinga go Camping | Pinga has Hiccups | Like Father Like Pingu - Pingu and Pinga sleep in a tent and Pingu tries to scare her. | When Pinga has a case of the hiccups, Pingu tries to get rid of them by scaring his little sister. | When he takes Pingu on a fishing trip, it turns out that Father doesn't always know best.

programme.title: Monkey Up
programme.desc: The all-new family comedy about a talking capuchin monkey seeking to gain fame and fortune as a movie star, but instead finds what's most important, a family.

programme.title: Bigfoot
programme.desc: After his bicycle crashes into a forest, Percy Caldwell encounters a new friend, Bigfoot, an eight-foot-tall creature, who has been displaced by a recent forest fire. But when two bullies find Bigfoot, they decide to capture him, take him back to their farm, and sell him to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: A lonely boy's life is transformed when he befriends a “wonder” dog who teaches him to play basketball.

programme.title: She's Funny That Way
programme.desc: Isabella, a young Hollywood starlet, recalls how the actions of charming Broadway director, Arnold, changed her life forever.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: Unjustly fired by a spoilt and selfish yacht owner, Kate gets payback when he falls overboard and wakes up with amnesia...

programme.title: The Ballad of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: An aging gunslinger sets out to avenge his friend who is murdered in cold blood. Starring Bill Pullman, Peter Fonda and Jim Caviezel (2017).

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger heads to the small town of Helena to investigate a series of disappearances and murders of the local townsfolk. Starring Woody Harrelson and Liam Hemsworth (2016)

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: At the end of the Civil War, a colonel hunts down a man with whom he had a grudge. Starring Liam Neeson and Pierce Brosnan (2006).

programme.title: The Ballad of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: An aging gunslinger sets out to avenge his friend who is murdered in cold blood. Starring Bill Pullman, Peter Fonda and Jim Caviezel (2017).

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: Boot up for suspense and high-powered excitement with Jonny Lee Miller and Angelina Jolie when a group of hackers, the rebels of the information age, find themselves embroiled in a plot that could destroy the world's ecosystems…or their own lives.

programme.title: Jabberwocky
programme.desc: Amid the filth and muck of England in the Dark Ages, a fearsome dragon stalks the land, casting a shadow of terror upon the kingdom of Bruno the Questionable. Who should emerge as the town's only possible saviour but Dennis Cooper (Michael Palin), an endearingly witless bumpkin who stumbles onto the scene and is flung into the role of brave knight.

programme.title: The Bike Thief
programme.desc: A gritty British drama-thriller starring Alec Secareanu (God's Own Country) and Anamaria Marinca (4 Months, 3 Weeks And 2 Days). The Rider is an ordinary, hard-working man who is a delivery driver for a local restaurant, which is owned and run by his landlord. When the Rider's moped is stolen, his world turns upside down and a race against time starts to recover the source of his livelihood.

programme.title: Away from Her
programme.desc: A double-Oscar-nominated, beautifully subtle exploration of a devastating disease Julie Christie turns in a Golden Globe winning performance in this honest, life-affirming story of relationships, love and devotion.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A nurse is exposed to a supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before killing them.

programme.title: The Grudge 2
programme.desc: In Tokyo, the sister of a girl previously killed by an evil curse must learn how to stop it once and for all.

programme.title: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A group of backpackers' vacation sours when a bus accident leaves them marooned in a remote Brazilian area.

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A nurse is exposed to a supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before killing them.

programme.title: The Grudge 2
programme.desc: In Tokyo, the sister of a girl previously killed by an evil curse must learn how to stop it once and for all.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: An adaptation based on a novel by Christopher Isherwood, A Single Man is a romantic tale of love interrupted, the isolation that is an inherent part of the human condition, and ultimately the importance of the seemingly smaller moments in life. Set in Los Angeles in 1962, at the height of the Cuban missile crisis, A Single Man, tells the story of a British college professor (Colin Firth) who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events and encounters, ultimately leads him to decide if there is a meaning to life after the death of his long time partner, Jim (Matthew Goode, Watchmen).

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history. Based on the novel by the author of War Horse, Waiting for Anya follows the story of Jo Lalande, a thirteen-year-old shepherd living in the mountain village of Lescun. Though Europe may be ravaged by the horrors of World War II, Jo's world in the French Pyrenees has remained remarkably untouched. That is, until a ferocious encounter with a bear introduces Jo to the mysterious Benjamin, a Jewish refugee who is desperately awaiting the arrival of his missing daughter, Anya, before making his escape across the border. Making friends with Benjamin and his mother-in-law Horcada, an isolated widow who lives in the nearby mountains, Jo becomes aware of a very dangerous secret - the family are involved in smuggling Jewish children over the mountains to the safety of Spain. In a heroic act of defiance, Jo promises to assist Benjamin in his endeavours...but soon becomes embroiled in a perilous conspiracy when German troops make their descent upon the village. Filmed in the village of Lescun and the surrounding Aspe Valley, France in which the true to life story also originated, the film boasts an all-stellar cast including Noah Schnapp (Stranger Things), Academy Award Winner Anjelica Huston (Ever After, The Addams Family), Jean Reno (Leon, The Big Blue, Ronin), Frederick Schmidt (Mission: Impossible - Fallout), Thomas Kretschmann (The Pianist, Central Intelligence) and Nicholas Rowe (Riviera, Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels).

programme.title: It Follows
programme.desc: For 19-year-old Jay (Maika Monroe), the fall should be about school, boys and weekends out at the lake. But after a seemingly innocent sexual encounter, she finds herself plagued by strange visions and the inescapable sense that someone, or something, is following her. Faced with this burden, Jay and her teenage friends must find a way to escape the horrors that seem to be only a few steps behind.

programme.title: Pressure Point (PKA Heart of Champions)
programme.desc: Tough Army veteran, Coach Murphy (Shannon), arrives at the start of the new season to transform the status quo of a failing rowing team and unlock their true potential. With some tough love, can Coach Murphy inspire these young men to learn what it takes to be a team?

programme.title: Here Awhile
programme.desc: Here Awhile is a heart-wrenching and thought-provoking family drama starring Anna Camp (Pitch Perfect), Steven Strait (The Expanse) and Joe Lo Truglio (Brooklyn Nine Nine, Superbad). Terminally ill Anna returns to Portland, Oregon after fifteen years to reconnect with her long estranged younger brother Michael. She reveals to him the difficult decision she has made.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Based on shocking true events. In November 1942 hundreds of Jewish citizens in Norway were taken from their homes. Men, women and children forced on to a ship headed for Oslo, with the destination set to be where the industrialisation of human suffering became a horrifying reality - Auschwitz. Follow one family's struggle as the life they knew and loved is ripped from them by the tides of war.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Full of love and humour, this charming father-daughter tale is set to tug at your heart-strings. Struggling dancer, Athena (Rose Leslie: Game of Thrones) decides to move back home when her father (Ray Liotta) is diagnosed with cancer. But when a life-changing call-back comes her way, will Athena take up her dream opportunity? An uplifting journey of life, sacrifice and - balance! Ground-breaking!

programme.title: True Love Blooms
programme.desc: Can an unlikely friendship between a community gardener Vikki and real estate developer, Chase, blossom into something else? (2019)

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: Diane is a struggling single mom in LA. Just when things are at there worst, she inherits a house, but she will have to live in small town USA and take care of a dog.

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: Victoria is in Paris for friend's wedding, but she needs a date to make her ex believe she's over him, will Jacques her childhood French pen pal assist her in this ruse? (2021)

programme.title: A Vineyard Romance
programme.desc: Samantha returns to her hometown to write an article about a wedding hotspot. But her assignment is complicated when she discovers that her ex is about to get married at the venue. (2021)

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Haley is as anti-marriage as it gets, but when she tries on her grandma's ‘magical' wedding veil, she's transported to her future, where she and long-term boyfriend Scott are happily married with two beautiful children.

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen's romantic comedy A RAINY DAY IN NEW YORK tells the story of college sweethearts, Gatsby (Timothée Chalamet) and Ashleigh (Elle Fanning), whose plans for a romantic weekend together in New York City are dashed as quickly as the sunlight turns into showers.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: Made For You, With Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Good Enough
programme.desc: A comedic drama that follows New York City based flight attendant Lorna Flynn on her obsessive journey to find her long lost relative after her absent father passes away. Starring: AnnaRose King, Ted Tremper, Becky Yamamoto

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can't refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: In this heart-warming romantic comedy, an athlete and volunteer form an unexpected bond at the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: "Dance-Off" tells the story of two rival dance studios whose star-crossed lovers, Brandon and Jasmine, must compete against each other for $25,000 and the top award, the Platinum Platinum.

programme.title: The Wedding Planners
programme.desc: James and Hannah back a bride and groom caught between their own wedding vision and family traditions.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: It's a Fixer Upper
programme.desc: When The Dovers find they're in financial jeopardy, the only answer is to sell the house Anne's parent's left her. But when no one wants to buy it, they decide the only way to get rid of the house is to fix it up.

programme.title: Plus One at an Amish Wedding
programme.desc: April Monroe is a superstar doctor at a big New York hospital, who has fallen head-over-heels for charming veterinarian Jesse, and their relationship seems to be heading in the right direction except for one thing: Jesse is completely tight-lipped about his Amish family.

programme.title: Accused at 17
programme.desc: Bianca's prank on Dory, her boyfriend's fling, leads to a murder accusation.

programme.title: Pretty Little Addict
programme.desc: Jennifer Phillips starts drinking after her father's death and injures Colin.

programme.title: Pregnant at 17
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal crime, Chelsea, 17, falls for older man Jeff.

programme.title: Accused at 17
programme.desc: Bianca's prank on Dory, her boyfriend's fling, leads to a murder accusation.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: A girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) takes her brother (Tyler Humphrey) and dog on an adventure after an angel grants her three wishes.

programme.title: The Joneses Unplugged
programme.desc: With their relationship under strain, a young couple decides to ditch the distractions of technology in order to reconnect to one another.

programme.title: Nash
programme.desc: This coming of age documentary chronicles the life of NBA All Star Steve Nash as he tries to navigate his way through the somewhat toils of professional sports while trying to leave a lasting legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: Baby Bootcamp
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Julia is down on her luck, trying to make her baby boot camp a thriving business. To make ends meet, she becomes a part-time nanny for a single widowed father. Trouble is, she knows nothing about taking care of children.

programme.title: Game of Love
programme.desc: Ex-Wife Frances conspires with her grown children to force Jake to sell his cherished Seattle basketball team. Will game changing moves off the court help reignite romantic sparks?

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Fifteen Scaffolds for the Killer
programme.desc: Accused of a hideous crime they did not commit, the members of two rivaling gangs, persecuted by a bloodthirsty lynch mob, take refuge in an abandoned fort, taking two hostages with them.

programme.title: Ben and Charlie
programme.desc: Two likable bandits try to make a living in the Old West.

programme.title: Stranger On Horseback
programme.desc: Circuit judge Rick Thorne arrives in Bannerman and uncovers that rancher Josiah Bannerman and his family control the town. After Tom Bannerman kills a man with no consequence, Thorne steps in and arrests him. As he seeks allies, including Amy Lee, the rancher's niece, Thorne faces pursuit, betrayal, and the challenge of getting Tom to trial.

programme.title: Dead are Countless
programme.desc: As a child, Johnny witnessed his father's death at the hands of soldiers. Now an outlaw, he seeks revenge by killing soldiers whenever possible. Lieutenant Garringo is tasked with capturing Johnny and bringing him back alive. A dangerous game of cat and mouse ensues, with Garringo determined to fulfill his mission.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP13-16
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: Danger Within
programme.desc: Campo 127, situated in northern Italy, houses nearly 400 British prisoners-of-war, who have one common desire - to escape.

programme.title: The Day Will Dawn
programme.desc: Hugh Williams stars as Colin, a foreign correspondent based in Norway who becomes an important tool against the Nazis.

programme.title: Nine Men
programme.desc: Sergeant Watson listened to the grumbles of his men, who had been going through a day's heavy training in battle school.

programme.title: Convoy
programme.desc: A dashing young officer arrives on Captain Armitage's flagship. But the two men are not strangers, for the new recruit is the man who broke up Captain Armitage's marriage by running away with his wife.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: The Penitent Man
programme.desc: When a mysterious client reveals he is from the future, a psychologist heeds the man's warning and sets out to change the course of his life.

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective: Eat, Drink and Be Buried
programme.desc: When a culinary whiz is hired to oversee the kitchen at an annual summer gala, he soon finds himself caught up in another murder mystery. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2019)

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: When a banker is found dead in a Victorian mansion, Shannon Hughes finds herself within another murder case. Starring Jewel (2018)

programme.title: Murder 101: Locked Room Mystery
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private eye investigate a murder at a new age retreat

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries: Poisoned In Paradise
programme.desc: (2021) Crime mystery with Jesse Metcalfe and Sarah Lind. When a waitress is poisoned after seeking his help, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson unravel what she had been trying to warn him about?

programme.title: Son Of A Gun
programme.desc: Two of Australia's most notorious criminals escape prison to go on a robbery spree with their gang. Starring Ewan McGregor, Brenton Thwaites and Alicia Vikander (2014).

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Get Carter
programme.desc: A Las Vegas mob enforcer travels back to his hometown to investigate his brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Nowhere To Run
programme.desc: Action star Jean-Claude Van Damme is an escaped convict hiding out in a widow's (Rosanna Arquette) farm. When a land developer tries to force Arquette off her land in order to complete a multimillion dollar real estate deal, Van Damme steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: Vertical Limit

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: The youngest son (Hardy) of an alcoholic former boxer (Nolte) returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament -- a path that puts the fighter on a collision corner with his older brother (Edgerton).

programme.title: Secret Window
programme.desc: A writer is stalked at his remote lakeside cabin by a psychotic stranger seeking revenge for perceived plagiarism.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Chronicling the adventures of an eccentric, resilient and tight-knit family, THE GLASS CASTLE is a remarkable story of unconditional love.

programme.title: JFK
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy in Dallas, Texas, in 1963. What he learns leads him to suspect that there is more to the story than the public is being told.

programme.title: Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV
programme.desc: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the sacred Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis (Sean Bean) commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive..

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.

programme.title: S14 E18 Gloucestershire
programme.desc: Spiritual couple seeks retreat in Gloucestershire for £850,000.

programme.title: S14 E3 Cumbria
programme.desc: Newly-weds seek period property in Cumbria for £700,000.

programme.title: S16 E6 Wiltshire
programme.desc: Alistair helps an Aussie returnee couple find a Wiltshire home, surprised by UK prices.

programme.title: S3 E10 Solihull to Warwickshire
programme.desc: Flight attendant Louise and her pilot boyfriend Chris crisscross the globe staying in all the top cities. Now they're buying their first home together and know exactly what they're looking for – a peaceful country sanctuary.

programme.title: S12 E5 North Yorkshire
programme.desc: Denise aids retirees seeking Yorkshire cottage and large garage with £310K.

programme.title: S12 E6 Devon
programme.desc: Aled assists developers seeking modern mansion in rural Devon with up to £1M.

programme.title: S11 E2 North Wales
programme.desc: Jules aids retired couple seeking North West Wales country house for £450k.

programme.title: S3 E38 Cannock to Shropshire
programme.desc: When Kay and Paul's young son fell dangerously ill last year, they decided to get out of Cannock and head for North Shropshire. They boy's grandmother is coming too, so it means the hunt is on for a large house with an annex and land to keep horses.
